# youtrack_appearance_settings (Resource)

YouTrack appearance settings configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_appearance_settings" "example" {
  date_format_id = "youtrack.datefieldformat.medium_with_24h"
  time_zone_id   = "Europe/Zurich"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `date_format_id` (String) Date format identifier
- `time_zone_id` (String) Time zone identifier (e.g., 'Europe/Zurich', 'America/New_York')

### Read-Only

- `date_format_date_pattern` (String) Date format date pattern
- `date_format_pattern` (String) Date format pattern (e.g., 'yyyy-MM-dd', 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm', 'MM/dd/yyyy')
- `date_format_presentation` (String) Date format presentation string
- `id` (String) Appearance settings identifier
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update
- `time_zone_offset` (Number) Time zone offset in milliseconds
- `time_zone_presentation` (String) Time zone presentation string

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Appearance settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current appearance settings.
terraform import youtrack_appearance_settings.example global
```
